metadata.description: ARIA — AI-Readable Intent Architecture. Formal specification language compiler with skills, MCP server, and reverse-engineering tools for AI-driven development.

plugins.name: aria
plugins.description: Complete ARIA workflow orchestrator. Routes to forward (build new), reverse (import existing TS), maintain (audit drift), or setup (first-time install) workflows. Integrates all 12 ARIA CLI commands plus the MCP server.
